name: Priya
backstory: Junior in nursing. High-achieving on paper but burning out from overscheduling and constant self-monitoring. Feels like she has to work three times as hard as her peers to appear equally competent.
emotional_triggers: being told she is 'so organized' when she is actually barely keeping it together
any suggestion that she just needs better time management
existing_strengths: Exceptional pattern recognition. Deep empathy. Thrives with hands-on learning.
what_success_looks_like: Permission to do less without being told why doing less will eventually make her do more.
